name: Fission Energy Corp.
description: Fission Energy Corp. was a Canadian uranium exploration company focused on acquiring, exploring, and developing uranium properties, primarily in the Athabasca Basin of Saskatchewan, Canada. The company's key asset was the Waterbury Lake uranium project. In 2013, Fission Energy Corp. sold its main assets, including Waterbury Lake, to Denison Mines Corp., while its remaining assets, including the Patterson Lake South (PLS) property, were spun out into a newly formed company, Fission Uranium Corp.
